title: orchis militaris subsp. stevenii
intro: Orchis militaris subsp. stevenii, also known as the military orchid, is a subspecies of orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as improving cardiovascular health, reducing oxidative stress, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of supplements, capsules, and extracts, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively studied in clinical trials.
